files.patch:
@@ -75,7 +75,7 @@ update_activity_metrics() {
 
     # Update active agents in metrics
     if [ -f "$UPDATE_SCRIPT" ]; then
-        "$UPDATE_SCRIPT" agents "$agent_count" >/dev/null 2>&1
+        "$UPDATE_SCRIPT" agent "$agent_count" >/dev/null 2>&1
     fi
 
     # Update integration status based on activity

@@ -116,6 +116,11 @@
             "type": "command",
             "timeout": 3000,
             "command": "npx agentic-flow@alpha hooks post-command \"$TOOL_INPUT_command\" --success --learn --performance-metrics --v3-mode 2>/dev/null || true"
+          },
+          {
+            "type": "command",
+            "timeout": 2000,
+            "command": ".claude/helpers/swarm-monitor.sh check 2>/dev/null || true"
           }
         ]
       },

           },
